ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (mpg) of the vehicle */,
  "cyl" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "dis" INTEGER /* Displacement of the vehicle's engine */,
  "hp" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the vehicle */,
  "acc" REAL /* Acceleration of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle model */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of fuel used */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of transmission */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vehicle record is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES engine_types ("engine_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the country of origin */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country of origin */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the country of origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the model */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer */,
  "model_series" TEXT /* Series of the model */,
  "is_discontinued" INTEGER /* Indicates if the model is discontinued */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_models_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_features_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_feature_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the feature for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES vehicle_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_feature_values_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_types" (
  "engine_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine type */,
  "engine_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the engine type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission type */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transmission type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's team */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the vehicle */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the document belongs to */,
  "doc_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., user manual, technical specification) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the document */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_documentation_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the video belongs to */,
  "video_path" TEXT /* File path to the video */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the video */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_videos_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_ratings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the specification belongs to */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification (e.g., horsepower, torque) */,
  "specification_value" TEXT /* Value of the specification */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the specification value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_specifications_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_comparison" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "vehicle_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first vehicle being compared */,
  "vehicle_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second vehicle being compared */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_text" TEXT /* Text of the comparison */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparison_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparison_vehicle_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id_2") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_comparison_vehicle_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id_1") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
